AI-generated triage signals
From 15 issues · 5 CQC domains
✦ AI confidence What this measures: agreement between the AI's CQC-domain theme classification and a clinical reviewer on a labelled validation set of FFT free-text comments.

Method: a held-out sample is dual-coded by the model and a reviewer; confidence is the percentage where both agree.

Target: 91% before AI classifications inform reporting without manual review.
83.4%target 91%
Theme classification vs clinical reviewer

Issue tracker

IDSettingWardSeverityStatus
Showing the 3 deteriorating issues that most need attention, ranked by severity then by how recently they were raised. Switch to "Show all" to see every issue and use the filters.
Issue ID Setting Ward Category
Severity
AI-calculated from deviation against the April 2026 national FFT benchmark. Critical = >10pp above benchmark negative rate.
